arkhe 0.5.0
  • Get started

Object Summaries

Source: R/AllGenerics.R, R/summary.R
summary.Rd

Produces result summaries.

Usage

# S4 method for AbundanceMatrix
summary(object, ...)

Arguments

object

An AbundanceMatrix object.

...

Currently not used.

Value

An AbundanceSummary object.

See also

Other mutators: mutators, subset()

Author

N. Frerebeau

Examples

## Create a data.frame
X <- matrix(data = sample(0:10, 50, TRUE), nrow = 10, ncol = 5)
Y <- as.data.frame(X)

## Coerce to a count matrix
Z <- as_count(Y)

## Set/get groups
set_samples(Z) <- rep(c("a", "b", "c", "d", "e"), each = 2)
get_samples(Z)
#>  [1] "a" "a" "b" "b" "c" "c" "d" "d" "e" "e"

## Set/get groups
set_groups(Z) <- rep(c("A", "B"), each = 5)
get_groups(Z)
#>  [1] "A" "A" "A" "A" "A" "B" "B" "B" "B" "B"

## Get/get TPQ/TAQ
chrono <- list(
  tpq = sample(1301:1400, 10, replace = TRUE),
  taq = sample(1451:1500, 10, replace = TRUE)
)
set_terminus(Z) <- chrono
get_terminus(Z)
#>        tpq  taq
#> row1  1320 1459
#> row2  1380 1467
#> row3  1388 1481
#> row4  1303 1488
#> row5  1305 1459
#> row6  1372 1462
#> row7  1321 1473
#> row8  1357 1498
#> row9  1313 1466
#> row10 1357 1480

## Collection of features
as_features(Z)
#>       V1 V2 V3 V4 V5 samples group dates  tpq  taq
#> row1   7 10  6  5  7       a     A    NA 1320 1459
#> row2   7  8  2  7  0       a     A    NA 1380 1467
#> row3   9  5  8  8 10       b     A    NA 1388 1481
#> row4   7  1  1  4  9       b     A    NA 1303 1488
#> row5   6  7  4  8  3       c     A    NA 1305 1459
#> row6   0  3  5  1  2       c     B    NA 1372 1462
#> row7   4  1  0  7 10       d     B    NA 1321 1473
#> row8   8 10  0  5  3       d     B    NA 1357 1498
#> row9   1  1  3  2  3       e     B    NA 1313 1466
#> row10  6  4  0  6 10       e     B    NA 1357 1480

## Summarize data
summary(Z)
#> <AbundanceSummary: 10 x 5>
#> A ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
#> * Observations: 5
#> * Variables: 5
#> * Replicated measurements: TRUE
#> * Chronology: 1303 - 1488 (year CE)
#> B ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
#> * Observations: 5
#> * Variables: 5
#> * Replicated measurements: TRUE
#> * Chronology: 1313 - 1498 (year CE)
#> --------------------------------------------------------------------------------

On this page

arkhe is a part of the tesselle project, a collection of packages for research and teaching in archaeology. Learn more at tesselle.org.

Developed by Nicolas Frerebeau.

Site built with pkgdown 2.0.3.
